tagline: Ask questions about your data in plain English.
readyDescription: Your insights, charts, and explanations appear here — shaped exactly for
switchPersonaNote: Switching re-renders all insights instantly — no new API call.
placeholder: e.g. Why did revenue drop in Q3?
somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
switchPersonaChip: Switch persona to see the same insight rendered differently
voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.

login.subtitle: Enter your User ID to load your personalized content and conversational history.
login.securityNotice: System secured for authorized personnel only.

upload.connectData: Choose how you want to connect your data to begin extracting actionable insights.
upload.generalDesc: Upload your own local CSV file to instantly generate charts, trends, and summaries.
upload.businessDesc: Connect to a pre-configured enterprise dataset with established governance schemas.
upload.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please ensure the backend is running.

onboarding.tailorNote: Your answers tailor every chart, explanation, and insight.
onboarding.q1Prompt: When you discover something important in your data, who depends on it most?
onboarding.q2Prompt: What convinces you that a data result is reliable?
onboarding.q2A3Label: 🔢  I can see the source and math
onboarding.q3Prompt: A key metric just dropped 20%. Your first instinct is to:
onboarding.q3A3Label: 🧪  Check if the data is right
onboarding.q4Prompt: How do you prefer to grasp the big picture at a glance?
onboarding.q4A1Label: 🎯  A simple Red / Yellow / Green signal
onboarding.q4A2Label: 📉  A trend line with clear direction
onboarding.q4A3Label: 📋  A full table with all the numbers

transition.readySimple: Ready. Every insight will be explained simply.
transition.readySpeed: Ready. Your workspace is optimized for speed and clarity.
transition.kpi: Configuring KPI dashboards and driver breakdowns...
transition.readyTeam: Ready. Your workspace is set for team-level insights.
transition.readyImpact: Ready. Your workspace is tailored for strategic impact.
transition.exact: Loading exact values, filters, and decomposition views...
transition.readyAnalyst: Ready. Your workspace is in Analyst power mode.
transition.trails: Configuring full source trails, timestamps, and traceability...
transition.readyAudit: Ready. All outputs are audit-ready and policy-mapped.
transition.trustNote: Same data. Different presentation. Adapted exactly for your role.
